## v0.118.3 - 2025-05-22 10:47

**Commit history:** [`v0.118.2...v0.118.3`](https://github.com/termux/termux-app/compare/21c0d51f...v0.118.3)

<details>
<summary>Changelog</summary>

### Changed

- **!** Remove `TERMUX_APP__BUILD_DATA_DIR` as a different naming scheme will be used for build variables and rename `TERMUX__ROOTFS` to `TERMUX__ROOTFS_DIR`. ([`849e6b10`](https://github.com/termux/termux-app/commit/849e6b10))

##  

 



### Fixed

- Bump `org.lsposed.hiddenapibypass:hiddenapibypass` to `6.1` to fix crash on Android 16 QPR1. Related commit https://github.com/LSPosed/AndroidHiddenApiBypass/commit/9efadf06. Related commit https://android-review.googlesource.com/c/platform/libcore/+/3380841. Related commit https://cs.android.com/android/_/android/platform/libcore/+/0dc31afe. Closes [#4556](https://github.com/termux/termux-app/issues/4556). ([`fda17afa`](https://github.com/termux/termux-app/commit/fda17afa))  

- Declare `MANAGE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE` as it being added in Termux:API version `0.51.0` is revoking the storage permission of Termux app after updates and sometimes later. Related issue [#4486](https://github.com/termux/termux-app/issues/4486). ([`23756528`](https://github.com/termux/termux-app/commit/23756528))  

- Add explicit `serialVersionUID` to `Serializable` classes like `ReportInfo` and `TextIOInfo`. Reading `ReportInfo` with `Bundle.getSerializable()` by `ReportActivity` is triggering exception when default algorithm is used for `serialVersionUID` in Termux:API plugin app when error notification created in `ResultReturner.returnData()` by `TermuxPluginUtils.sendPluginCommandErrorNotification()` is clicked. Related issue https://github.com/termux/termux-api/issues/762. ([`4f033b34`](https://github.com/termux/termux-app/commit/4f033b34))  

---

 

</details>

apps.author: bikram-agarwal
apps.name: ObtainX
apps.changeLog:
## ✨ New Features

- Download progress now shows how much has been downloaded (for example, "45% - 12 MB / 28 MB") in notifications and on the app list, with a cancel button in both places
- New **Card corners** setting lets you make list and card corners sharper or rounder across the app
- Category filters can match **Any** included category (OR) or **All** included categories (AND)
- Grouped app lists have **Expand all** and **Collapse all** controls
- When adding an app and ObtainX cannot figure out its package ID from the source alone, you can choose to download the APK once to identify it or add it as track-only instead

## 🚀 Improved Features
- The app should feel noticeably faster when opening, switching tabs, returning from the background, and scrolling long app lists
- Apps with custom or pseudo version numbers behave more predictably when version detection is off, including skip-version actions
- Backup export is more reliable and should not freeze or crash on large libraries or storage permission issues
- Release notes display images correctly more often, including notes hosted on GitHub, GitLab, and Codeberg
- The logs viewer is easier to read and share, with a clearer layout and a sensible default time window
- Install flows through third-party installers should finish more reliably when the installer does not hand focus back to ObtainX
- On the Add App screen, a save FAB appears at the bottom when you enter a URL, replacing the old inline add button
- Failed update checks on an app's page now stay visible in a clear error banner until you retry successfully
- Crash and error logs are captured more reliably, and shared log files include helpful device and settings details
- Downgrade blocking now applies only when using the stock Android installer, not Shizuku or third-party installers
- In batch update mode, app installations trigger as soon as one download finishes, instead of waiting for all downloads to finish.

## 🐛 Bug Fixes
- Fixed a crash when uninstalling apps
- Fixed crashes when swipe-to-update failed under some conditions
- Fixed release notes text being cut off at the bottom
- Fixed export crashes when the export folder could not be accessed
- Fixed gradient background missing on the Add App device tab

## What's Changed

### Theme changes
* Add default Material You themes by @lm41 in https://github.com/florisboard/florisboard/pull/3135

> [!NOTE]
> Theme authors have to implement the fix for uri popups themselves as this property is controlled by the theme. If you want an example on how to do this please have a look at the linked PR. 

### Clipboard history changes
* Clipboard history rework by @patrickgold in https://github.com/florisboard/florisboard/pull/3107
  * See the linked PR for detailed changes in the clipboard

### New features
* Add SwipeAction.SWITCH_TO_MEDIA_CONTEXT by @lm41 in https://github.com/florisboard/florisboard/pull/3143
* Add 'Hide Keyboard' action by @quycao in https://github.com/florisboard/florisboard/pull/3132

* Properly recalculate SurfaceView size by @lm41 in https://github.com/florisboard/florisboard/commit/666ce6227522f855eea22f31e8aa39abbfbfe68b
* Use different icon for paste action by @lm41 in https://github.com/florisboard/florisboard/pull/3106
* Fix wrong pref migration for clipboard sync by @lm41 in https://github.com/florisboard/florisboard/pull/3149
* Add uppercase letters to email regex by @klaurence in https://github.com/florisboard/florisboard/pull/3110

### New/Updated layouts

* Add Georgian Standard keyboard layout by @necioerrante in https://github.com/florisboard/florisboard/pull/3141

### Development changes
* Raise `targetSdk` to 36

## New Contributors
* @Shunnuo made their first contribution in https://github.com/florisboard/florisboard/pull/3079
